description_long: This is a high-top sneaker, specifically a Converse Chuck Taylor All Star, featuring a classic canvas upper in gray with white stitching and a white rubber toe cap. The shoe has a round rubber toe, metal eyelets for the laces, and a white rubber midsole with a black stripe running along its length. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white, blue, and red. The heel displays a branded rubber patch with the 'ALL★STAR' text. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the overall silhouette is slim and iconic, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A gray Converse Chuck Taylor high-top sneaker with white laces, a rubber toe cap, and a visible All Star logo patch on the side.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel with the 'ALL★STAR' branded rubber patch and visible stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full profile, white laces, and detailed stitching.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the white rubber toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical shape.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the circular Converse All Star logo patch and the shoe's overall silhouette.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner side, white with blue star and red text; rectangular 'ALL★STAR' rubber patch on the heel.
